Title: Enacts the "smart meter transparency and consumer protection act"
Summary: Enacts the "smart meter transparency and consumer protection act" in relation to requiring utilities to provide certain information about smart meters to customers; authorizes and directs the public service commission, in coordination with an independent third party, to conduct a study on smart meter implementation in New York state.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to requiring utilities to provide certain information about smart meters to customers; and authorizing and directing the public service commission to conduct a study on smart meter implementation in New York state
